chapter_title.en: Chapter on Recognizing the Major Sins for Which Allah {swt}, the Almighty, Has Threatened with Hellfire

text: 4953 - وَ قَالَ اَلصَّادِقُ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ : "مَنْ قَتَلَ نَفْسَهُ مُتَعَمِّداً فَهُوَ فِي نَارِ " جَهَنَّمُ خٰالِداً فِيهٰا" ".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4953 - Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) said:
"Whoever intentionally kills himself will be in the Fire of Hell, abiding therein forever."
